title: Runtime Status Snapshot
description: FR-VID-12 §4 Stage 8 — Active command/profile/agent/extensions/tools/memory state. Persisted in .cmf/runtime/ and surfaced via read-only API for future editor/dashboard/monitor consumers.

project_id.description: Project this runtime session is operating on.

command_id.description: The CMF command that initiated this runtime session.

profile_id.description: Active runtime profile for this session.

primary_agent.description: Agent ID (from DEP-RUN-002) of the primary agent for this session.

active_extensions.description: Extensions currently loaded for this session.

tools_used.description: Tool IDs (from DEP-RUN-003) invoked during this session.

last_intelligence_packet.description: Filesystem path to the last assembled intelligence packet for this session.

last_memory_writes.description: Map of memory object type to last persisted filesystem path.

pipeline_state.description: Current pipeline state from DEP-VID-025. Must match the 16-state enum exactly.

review_summary.description: Aggregated review state for the active project.

queue_summary.description: Aggregated queue state for the active project.

updated_at.description: Timestamp of the last status snapshot update.
